title: JV-06 - M2M100-418M permissive multilingual comparator benchmark

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

body:
## Summary

Benchmark M2M100-418M int8 as a permissively licensed multilingual comparator for ja->vi.

## Why is this needed?

M2M100 is larger than OPUS-MT but MIT-licensed and may offer better multilingual robustness or future language coverage.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- M2M100-418M model card and MIT license evidence.
- Corpus and benchmark harness from JV-02/JV-03.
- Runtime conversion feasibility from JV-10.

## Outputs

- Converted int8 candidate or documented blocker.
- 10-round benchmark artifact comparable to Google and OPUS-MT.
- Decision note on whether to keep M2M100 in the roadmap.

## Implementation approach

- Use CTranslate2 conversion when possible.
- Record forced target language token handling and tokenizer behavior.
- Keep this as comparator, not default, unless OPUS-MT fails and M2M100 meets all default gates.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Candidate benchmark is valid or failure is actionable.
- [ ] Quality/latency/RAM delta vs OPUS-MT and Google is recorded.
- [ ] License and redistribution status are clean.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Tokenizer target-language tests.
- [ ] Missing model skip behavior.
- [ ] Artifact validator and redaction scan.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-02, JV-03, and preferably JV-10.
- Blocks JV-08 if OPUS-MT is insufficient.

## Agent routing

Research/build hybrid on claude-sonnet-4.6+; nfr-verification-gate review.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-06
- Wave: M2 candidate
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: research, area: providers, provider: local, area: performance, priority:P1, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

New comparator. #372 tracked only OPUS-MT fixture rows.
